feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data to CPI via SAP API Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send request to SAP CPI via API Management.

But I am facing "401 Unauthorized" error while connecting to CPI though I have maintained correct credential in KeyValue Map. (CSRF token is unchecked in CPI HTTP adapter)

Using same credentials I am able to call CPI endpoint directly from Postman send data successfully.

I tried to test from both API Management and Postman(by calling API endpoint) but no luck. Also tried removing all the other policies.

Can someone help me understand if we have to do any kind of whitelisting or additional roles to be added to call CPI from APIM?

Below is the screen from APIM Debug :

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Madhura

entry.title: Override positionCriticality field in SuccessFactors using an integration (BTP) from HCM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are using the field positionCriticality in SuccessFactors Succession. This field is a position data which will update by the standard integration via BTP from HCM. Unfortunately the field gets override every day. Is there a possibility to adjust the integration that the content of the field will not override in SuccessFactors. Is it true, that there is only the following solution possible: 

Create a customer-specific field in SAP HCM, have it maintained there and include it in the “delta migration” of the OM objects

Does anybody see an alternative for this issue?

Thanks a lot for supporting! BR, Sandra

entry.title: No logs for successful messages in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In the message monitoring logs are not available for successful messages. We can only see that messages is successful.

For the errors we have logs, but for successful messages we don't have.

As the Retention period is 30 days, we can only see successful and failed messages. 

For eg. I would like to know File Transmission Logs.

File is picked from S4 AL11 - Archive - Target (These steps we can't see in case of INFO level and we can't change it to TRACE everytime).

Can anyone please help?

entry.title: Customize error message from SAP using CPI
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a requirement where we are expected to customise the error message sent from SAP system in CPI as User readable fromat.

Earlier On Order failure SAP sends error message and CPI sends it to receiver using ${exception.message} .

For reference dummy error is:

Error Message: X001234678000000UWE10000123451000012345

REGULAREV7777Sales document 1234678 is currently being processed by SYS_CPI_USER.0000001234678SYS_CPI_USER0EP1CLNT100

The requirement is to find the key word (i.e.,Sales document) from the error and intimate the receiver accordingly via CPI 

Kindly let me know if it is possible to modify the error message. Thanks.

Regards

Priya

entry.title: Sales Order and SAP BTP Use Case with SAP Build Apps, SAP Integration Suite and Sales Order API
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently working on my first Business Use Case using the SAP BTP abilities. What I would like to do is the following Use case : Anticipate delivery delay and inform the customer

I wanted to go trough those steps : 

  • Detection: The SAP system detects a delay or application.
  • Transmission: The event is sent to SAP Integration Suite through an API connection.
  • Preparation: SAP Integration Suite prepares the notification message.
  • Sending: Notification is sent to the client via email, SMS, or portal.
  • Confirmation: Receipt by the client is recorded.

I directly found my self in a bad spot about the delay detection and how to automate this step. So, I figured I had to simplify the use case in order to learn step by step the SAP BTP abilities and go with the automate delay detection later on. 

I finally chose to follow thoses steps : 

 

=> Develop a Build Apps Application and connect it to an Sales Order API from our S/4.

=> On the application, insert the product ID and the date on which the product will be delivered. 

=> Connected to the API Sales Order, we get the data about the product ID :

  • SalesOrder (key) : ID
  • RequestedDeliveryDate : Suggered delivery date by the system
  • DeliveryDateTypeRule : <blank>: The goods should be delivered on the requested delivery date or later. A: The goods must be delivered exactly on the confirmed delivery date. B: The goods must be delivered by the confirmed delivery date (that is, on the date or earlier).

=> We compare with the date input from the application to see if there will be any delay.

=>If there is any, we informe automatically the client by email (with intégration suite ?)

It brings me to the SAP community, to get an idea of the success possibility of this use case based on your opinions. To know if my choice of tools is accurate or if I could use any others, if the order in which I use them is accurate and if there is any advice or tips to be aware of before starting this use case.

Thank you all.

Regards,

Tom

entry.title: update print queue item status
entry.content:
Hi

I can retrieve print queue items through the API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV/RetrieveNextQueueItem and it seems to update the status to 'Transmitted' when we send a request. How can I update the status to 'Failed' or 'Successful' of a print queue item?

Thanks in advance.

JP

entry.title: Need to know the default host creation.
entry.content:
Where can we see the default host created for the trail account for provisioning of API in the integration suite.

Thank you

entry.title: Storing payload data in Application Message Type: SAP_MessageType
entry.content:
Dear All,

In the Content Modifier, we have the option to store a payload field's value in the SAP_MessageType property, which can be viewed in CPI monitoring as shown below. However, will this impact monitoring storage capacity? Would it be better to avoid using this property and instead use a custom property with SAP_MessageProcessingLogCustomStatus for logging?

Please advise on the best practice.

entry.title: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Hello - can you please help to fix the below code ? Req is to copy the complete xml but replace just one field by incrementing its value by 1.

Input:
<item>
<Field>10</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>20</Field1>
</item>

Output:
<item>
<Field>11</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>21</Field1>
</item>

I am pasting xsl I wrote with input and output values.

XSL:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:apply-templates select="*"/>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
<xsl:variable name="i" select="//RETAILNUMBER"/>
<RETAILNUMBER>
<xsl:value-of select="$i+1"/>
</RETAILNUMBER>
</xsl:template>

<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Input xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root

Output (Note the to be values in the output for retailnumber

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 2
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 3
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

entry.title: SAP->CPI Integration - WSDL Creation
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are trying to integrate ECC with an ecommerce platform via CPI.

SAP ECC would send data to CPI. 

Question is - what are best practices for the wsdl creation if there are any. 

I would really appreciate the information.

entry.title: Missing the 'Develop' tab in SAP Cloud Integration on the trial account.
entry.content:
In my trial account, I can't access the 'Develop' tab or create products. How am I supposed to study properly for the certification if the account I'm relying on doesn’t have all the features? Please help.

This is all I managed to configure:

This is the image that should supposedly appear:

I didn't understand if the exam will be based on an earlier version of the tool or if this is just for the trial account.

I really appreciate the help.

Regards,

Gabriela.

entry.title: Sync Employee Central Termination Date to S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We are currently replicating data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via an integration in SAP Integration Suite called "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Employee Data".

Is there a way we can replicate the termination date or Company Exit date from Employee Central to S/4 HANA Cloud and apply it to the Business User's validity?

That way whenever an employee is terminated from SuccessFactors, once the sync runs it will update the business user's validity on S/4 Hana Cloud and it will get deactivated.

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping - Context issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where i need to check if else condition of child nodes from first occurance of parent node. Below is my source structure:

<IDOC>
<E1KNA1M>  (0 to 1)
<E1KNVVM> (0 to unbounded)
<E1KNVPM> (0 to unbounded)
<PARVW>AG</PARVW> (0 to 1)
<KUNN2>111</KUNN2> (0 to 1) 
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>222</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
<KUNN2>333</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>444</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
</E1KNA1M>
</IDOC>

Here i need populate KUNN2 to target if PARVW is equal to ZN only from first occurance of E1KNVVM. i should suppress if there is a PARVW with ZN from any other E1KNVVM occurances. copy Value[0] will not work in this case as PARVW is inside E1KNVVM and has multiple occurances. Could you please help how can we achive this. Thanks in advance.

Thanks,

Sailaja.

entry.title: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?
entry.content: I have a scenario in  my project where i have connected non sap api using integration suite , now i want to consume that in my sap  btp CAPM application , how i can do this

entry.title: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the item node
entry.content:
Hello

Can someone please help in identifying the below issue in my xslt ? Req is to delete complete xml node based on one child node field.

XML input:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002620</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1001</TRANSTYPECODE>
<TRANSNUMBER>5</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002621</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE/>
<TRANSNUMBER>6</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

 

XML output: 2nd item node should be completely deleted/rejected as TRANSTYPECODE is blank.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002620</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1001</TRANSTYPECODE>
<TRANSNUMBER>5</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

XSL code:

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:fo="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Format"
xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Match and output only the segments meeting the specified condition -->
<xsl:template match="ns1:item[TRANSTYPECODE = '']">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Suppress output of all other segments -->
<xsl:template match="//ns1:item"/>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Send emails dynamically in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

Currently I am working on sending emails to multiple recipients using an XML payload defined as follows:

<EmpRecords>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>123</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Gopi</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>K</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000 </EmpSalary>
           <email>test1@mail.com</email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>456</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Ram</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>C</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test2@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>789</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Mohammad</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>Khan</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test3@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
      <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>234</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Varnikai</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>L</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
            <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test4@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
</EmpRecords>

The test emails are:

test1@mail.com

test2@mail.com

test3@mail.com

test4@mail.com

However, I have not found a way to put the 4 emails coming from the payload into the email connector definition.

 

Is there a method to dynamically place emails that come from an XML Payload?

Thanks

Regards

entry.title: I want to create an iFlow to register vendor invoice.
entry.content:
I want to create an iFlow to register vendor invoice.
The simplest case with one line of records to read and one credit and one debit account was successful.
However, we would like to support complex cases. For example, there are multiple accounts. For example, a journal entry using 63001000 and 63002000 for G/L Account on the debit side and 21100000 for the credit side. And there are multiple tax rates, each of which is calculated.

Example:

Example of records to be read:

There is one header line, one line for 63001000 and one line for 63002000.

I am having trouble creating an iFlow for such a case. I'm looking for samples or articles that might give me some hints, so if you know of any, please let me know.

entry.title: SAP BTP Integration Suite set-up problem
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using SAP BTP Trial and I want to install sap Integration Suite. I followed the tutorial : link
I'm currently at step 4 to "automatically assing roles and create service instances using booster" but I'm having a problem : 

It says that I have not subscribed to SAP Integration Suite. I checked my Users roles, my entitlements and my subscriptions but there are all complete. Does anybody understand why it's not working ? (I've done it again with ou without deleting the navigation data)

entry.title: IBM MQ QA server not reachable from Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We followed the same steps on both IBM MQ DEV & QA servers to establish the technical connection from Cloud Connector(hosted on our Organization data center). Our IBM MQ DEV server is reachable from Cloud connector whereas IBM MQ QA/INT server is not reachable. 

We did not import any certificate to  IBM MQ DEV server and it is reachable from Cloud Connector without any issues. Now, we are checking on why MQ QA is not reachable from Cloud Connector even after following same steps that is done for MQ DEV.. Please find the below screenshot regarding the error on Cloud connector while trying to reach MQ QA.

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Reading multipart form-data in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a scenario where sender sends form-data as below to Cloud Integration.

However in Cloud Integration we only need to read the main content of the file(SampleCSV.txt)  i.e. "1","2","3,a","4","5" and pass the same to target. Is there a standard way to achieve the same? Please advise

 

----------------------------705490356377119745888137
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="File"; filename="SampleCSV.txt"
Content-Type: text/plain

"1","2","3,a","4","5"
----------------------------705490356377119745888137--

 

Best Regards
